zh.Slaugham, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可斯勞加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Poynings於1355年出生在英國英格蘭素可斯勞加姆時，他的父親Michael de Poynings37歲，母親Joane de Rokesley34歲。他於大約1382年與Isabel FitzPayn在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1387年5月25日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安薩莫拉維利亞爾潘多享年32歲，埋葬在英國素可波尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Poynings于1355年出生在英国英格兰素可斯勞加姆时，他的父亲Michael de Poynings37岁，母亲Joane de Rokesley34岁。他于大约1382年与Isabel FitzPayn在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1387年5月25日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安薩莫拉維利亞爾潘多享年32岁，埋葬在英国素可波尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Poynings was born in 1355, in Slaugham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Michael de Poynings, was 37 and his mother, Joane de Rokesley, was 34. He married Isabel FitzPayn about 1382, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 25 May 1387, in Villalpando, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spain, at the age of 32, and was buried in Poynings, Sussex, England.

fr.Villalpando, Zamora, Castilla y León, Sp: Villalpando, Zamora, Castilla y León, Espagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Poynings est né en 1355, à Slaugham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Michael de Poynings, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Joane de Rokesley, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Isabel FitzPayn environ 1382, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 mai 1387, à Villalpando, Zamora, Castilla y León, Espagne, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Poynings, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.Villalpando, Zamora, Castilla y León, Sp: Villalpando, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Poynings 1355 in Slaugham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Michael de Poynings 37 und seine Mutter Joane de Rokesley 34. Er hat um 1382 in England Isabel FitzPayn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. Mai 1387 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Villalpando, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spanien und wurde in Poynings, Sussex, England begraben.

ko.Villalpando, Zamora, Castilla y León, Sp: 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 자모라 비라파도
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Poynings(이)가 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 슬로그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Michael de Poynings(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane de Rokesley(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1382년 영국에서 Isabel FitzPayn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1387년 5월 25일 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 자모라 비라파도에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 포이닝스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Poynings nasceu em 1355, em Slaugham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Michael de Poynings, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Joane de Rokesley, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel FitzPayn aproximadamente 1382, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de maio de 1387, em Villalpando, Zamora, Castilla y León, Espanha, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.Villalpando, Zamora, Castilla y León, Sp: виллалпандо, замора, кастилла и леoн, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Poynings родился в 1355 г. в местности слоам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Michael de Poynings было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane de Rokesley, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel FitzPayn около 1382 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 мая 1387 г. в местности виллалпандо, замора, кастилла и леoн, Испания в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности поинингс, суссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Isabel FitzPayn aproximadamente 1382, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de mayo de 1387, en Villalpando, Zamora, Castilla y León, España, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra.
